title: hymenophyllum hirtellum var. hirtellum
intro: Hymenophyllum hirtellum var. hirtellum, also known as the hairy maidenhair, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is a delicate and rare plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions. The hairy maidenhair has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
